name: agy-plugin
description: Routes high-volume work to Antigravity/Gemini Flash via a hardened wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. Prefer for lower-intelligence bulk work; install grok-plugin for stronger reasoning.
